stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An ATS flight plan for a VFR flight is submitted before departure with the following data:

Item 13: 1000
Item 16: 0134

Which statement is correct, if the estimated taxi time at departure is 10 min?

options.a: The Estimated Off-Block Time is 10:10 UTC.
options.b: The Estimated Take-off Time is 10:00 UTC.
options.c: The Estimated Time of Arrival at destination is 11:44 UTC.
options.d: The Estimated Time of Arrival at destination is 11:34 UTC.
